channel.title: math.KT updates on arXiv.org
channel.description: math.KT updates on the arXiv.org e-print archive.

item.title: Refined index obstructions for Brauer classes on an abelian variety
item.description: arXiv:2605.26407v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We produce refined index obstructions, generalizing recently constructed index obstructions due to de Jong and Perry, for topologically trivial Brauer classes on smooth and projective complex varieties. We show that our refined obstructions are more stringent than previous obstructions and, as a consequence, we produce more counterexamples to the integral Hodge conjecture. Throughout this work, we focus on algorithmic aspects of these obstructions and we illustrate many of these aspects through the concrete examples of complex abelian varieties.
item.dc:creator: Eoin Mackall

item.title: Higher Kazhdan projections and delocalised $\ell^ 2$-Betti numbers
item.description: arXiv:2405.03837v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: We provide an explicit description of the K-classes of higher Kazhdan projections in degrees greater than 0 for specific free product groups and Cartesian product groups. Employing this description, we obtain new calculations of Lott's delocalised $\ell^2$-Betti numbers. Notably, we establish the first non-vanishing results for infinite groups.
item.dc:creator: Sanaz Pooya, Hang Wang
